# Weaver Design System

> Weaver is a custom internal design system maintained in Figma and shipped as a Joy UI theme package (`weaver-ui-joyui`). Wrap an app with `<WeaverProvider>` and all `@mui/joy` components match the Figma designs. Distributed as a versioned tarball on Google Cloud Storage (not on npm). Current MVP scope: Blue theme, Light mode, Default radius, Inter font, no RTL.

## About

- [Project architecture](./CLAUDE.md) — monorepo layout, key files, build commands
- [Consumer docs](./README.md) — installation, usage, version history
- Reference architecture: github.com/khaaledashraaf/banhatten-ds

## Foundations

- [Design tokens](packages/tokens/src/tokens.json) — single source of truth: brand primitives (~295 raw colors with shades 50–950) and alias semantics (~223 tokens: `bg-*`, `content-*`, `border-*`, `interactive-*`), plus shadow, radius, spacing
- [Token resolver](packages/joyui/src/tokens.ts) — `resolve("{group.key}")` for alias resolution
- [Palette](packages/joyui/src/palette.ts) — Joy UI color schemes: `primary`, `neutral`, `danger`, `success`, `warning`
- [Typography](packages/joyui/src/typography.ts) — Inter font, 14 levels (7 body × `body-md|sm|xs|2xs|3xs|lg|xl`, 4 heading × `h1|h2|h3|h4`, 3 title × `title-lg|md|sm`), default text color `content-default` (`#101B2E`)
- [Theme](packages/joyui/src/theme.ts) — static `weaverTheme` export via `extendTheme()`
- [Provider](packages/joyui/src/provider.tsx) — `WeaverProvider` wraps `CssVarsProvider` + `CssBaseline`
- [Augmentations](packages/joyui/src/augmentations.ts) — TypeScript module augmentations for custom variants (e.g. button `secondary`)

## Figma-to-Code Rules

- [packages/joyui/RULES.md](packages/joyui/RULES.md) — **canonical source**. Component mappings (Tag→Chip, Toggle→Switch, Pagination→WeaverPagination, …), full button variant matrix (10 variants × 4 sizes), color mappings (Green→success, Red→danger, …), Remix Icon conventions, and the 8 mandatory implementation rules (no `sx` on themed components, no opacity for disabled states, no focus ring on error inputs, no invented variants, etc.). Ships inside the `weaver-ui-joyui` package as `node_modules/weaver-ui-joyui/RULES.md`.
- [packages/joyui/.claude/skills/weaver-figma/SKILL.md](packages/joyui/.claude/skills/weaver-figma/SKILL.md) — Claude Code skill (thin pointer). Frontmatter triggers it on Figma mentions; body redirects the agent to read RULES.md and llms.txt from the installed package, so consumers don't need to re-copy the skill when rules change.
- Source-of-truth Figma file: "Weaver Design system (Copy)" (fileKey `YiS0OyrJAwxI1VRl9bTuDN`)

## Components

Each entry: spec (variants, sizes, states, props, slots, token references) · implementation (Joy UI styleOverrides) · live demo.

- [Accordion](packages/specs/src/accordion.json) — vertically stacked expandable/collapsible content sections; default and boxed visual styles. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/accordion.ts`. Demo: `/components/accordion`.
- [Alert](packages/specs/src/alert.json) — contextual feedback banner; light, outline, solid styles with expandable content. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/alert.ts`. Demo: `/components/alerts`.
- [Avatar](packages/specs/src/avatar.json) — visual representation via image, initials, or icon; circular and rounded shapes across nine sizes. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/avatar.ts`. Demo: `/components/avatar`.
- [Badge](packages/specs/src/badge.json) — small label for status, counts, and categorization; supports dot, icon, and flag types. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/badge.ts`. Demo: `/components/badges`.
- [Banner](packages/specs/src/banner.json) — promotional or informational bar at the top of a page or section; multiple layout types, sizing modes, and color themes. Spec only — no Joy UI override or demo route yet.
- [Breadcrumbs](packages/specs/src/breadcrumbs.json) — hierarchical navigation trail; text, icon, avatar items and configurable separators. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/misc.ts`. Demo: `/components/breadcrumbs`.
- [Button](packages/specs/src/button.json) — primary interactive element; 10 variants × 4 sizes (`xs` 32px / `sm` 36px / `md` 40px / `lg` 48px), optional leading/trailing icons. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/button.ts`. Demo: `/components/buttons`.
- [Checkbox](packages/specs/src/checkbox.json) — binary or indeterminate selection control; leading/trailing label placement and optional support text. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/checkbox.ts`. Demo: `/components/checkbox-radio`.
- [Divider](packages/specs/src/divider.json) — visual separator; horizontal and vertical orientation, solid or dotted styles. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/divider.ts`. Demo: `/components/divider`.
- [IconButton](packages/specs/src/icon-button.json) — button rendering only an icon, for compact toolbar/table-row/card-header actions. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/button.ts` (shares the Button override). Demo: `/components/buttons`.
- [Input](packages/specs/src/input.json) — single-line text input; layouts include add-ons, tags, dropdowns, quantity steppers; focus/filled/error/disabled states. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/input.ts`. Demo: `/components/inputs`.
- [LinkButton](packages/specs/src/link-button.json) — text-styled button resembling a hyperlink, for low-emphasis actions or inline navigation. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/button.ts` (`variant="link"`). Demo: `/components/buttons`.
- [Menu](packages/specs/src/menu.json) — dropdown menu of actions or options; multi-line items, progress, dividers, captions. Spec only — no Joy UI override or demo route yet.
- [Modal](packages/specs/src/modal.json) — overlay dialog for focused interactions; multiple sizes, header configurations, footer button layouts. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/surfaces.ts` (`JoyModal`, `JoyModalDialog`, `JoyModalClose`, `JoyDrawer`, `JoyDialog*`, `JoyCard*`, `JoySheet`). Demo: `/components/cards-modals`.
- [Pagination](packages/specs/src/pagination.json) — page navigation; simple prev/next, numeric page buttons, summary display. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/pagination.tsx` (custom component `WeaverPagination`). Demo: `/components/pagination`.
- [Progress](packages/specs/src/progress.json) — linear progress bar; multiple color themes and two sizes. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/progress.ts` (covers linear and circular). Demo: `/components/progress`.
- [Radio](packages/specs/src/radio.json) — single-selection control within a group; leading/trailing label placement and optional support text. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/radio.ts`. Demo: `/components/checkbox-radio`.
- [Select](packages/specs/src/select.json) — dropdown selection input; single, multi-select, avatar, and tag-based modes. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/select.ts`. Demo: `/components/select`.
- [Slider](packages/specs/src/slider.json) — range input control; tooltips and text indicators. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/slider.ts`. Demo: `/components/slider`.
- [Table](packages/specs/src/table.json) — data table; sortable columns, selectable rows, cell content including avatars, badges, and actions. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/misc.ts`. Demo: `/components/tables`.
- [Tabs](packages/specs/src/tabs.json) — horizontal navigation tabs; underline, segment, rounded, and bill styles. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/misc.ts`. Demo: `/components/tabs`.
- [Tag](packages/specs/src/tag.json) — compact label for categorization, filtering, status; icons, dots, flags, avatars, close action. **In code this is `<Chip>`**, not `<Badge>` — see SKILL.md component mapping. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/chip.ts`. Demo: `/components/chips`.
- [Textarea](packages/specs/src/textarea.json) — multi-line text input; tags mode and error state. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/input.ts` (shares the input override). Demo: `/components/inputs`.
- [Toggle](packages/specs/src/toggle.json) — on/off switch for binary settings; optional icon inside the handle. **In code this is `<Switch>`**, not Toggle. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/switch.ts`. Demo: `/components/switch`.
- [Tooltip](packages/specs/src/tooltip.json) — contextual popup on hover/focus; pointer positioning, two visual styles. Implementation: `packages/joyui/src/components/tooltip.ts`. Demo: `/components/tooltips`.

## Custom components (no spec yet)

These ship from `weaver-ui-joyui` directly because Joy UI has no equivalent or the Weaver design diverges enough to warrant a custom component:

- `WeaverPagination` — see Pagination above.
- `WeaverDatePicker` — `mode="single" | "range"`, sizes `xs|sm|md`, native date math (no extra deps), `calendarPos` for popover placement (`top-left`/`top-center`/`top-right`/`bottom-left`/`bottom-center`/`bottom-right`), optional `todayLabel`. Demo: `/components/date-picker`.
- `WeaverCalendar` — inline calendar, used when the calendar should always be visible. Demo: `/components/date-picker`.

## Limitations (current MVP)

What is **not** implemented yet:

- Light mode only (Figma has Light + Dark)
- Blue theme only (Figma has Blue, Gray, Brown, Yellow)
- Default radius only (Figma has Default, Rounded, Sharp)
- Inter font only (Figma has Inter, Geist, Mono, Alexandria)
- No RTL support
- Icons are not bundled (consumers install `@remixicon/react` separately)

## Distribution

Not on npm. Each commit that bumps `packages/joyui/package.json` publishes a tarball to Google Cloud Storage via `cloudbuild.yaml`. Consumers depend on a versioned URL like:

```json
"weaver-ui-joyui": "https://storage.googleapis.com/noon-toolbox/perm/weaver/weaver-ui-joyui-0.1.7.tgz"
```

See [README.md](./README.md) for the version history table.
